title: Design & Development
desc: End-to-end design and development, built around your goals. Everything from initial concept and visual design through to a fully deployed, production-ready site — clean code, deliberate design decisions, and full involvement at every stage until the work is done right.

title: Web Updates & Maintenance
desc: Launching your site is just the beginning. As your business evolves, your website should too — I provide ongoing support for updates, performance improvements, and anything else that comes up, so your site always reflects where your business is today.

title: Email Services
desc: Email is one of the most direct ways to reach your audience, and it deserves the same attention as the rest of your website. Whether you need a professional address, a branded template, or just a reliable setup, I make sure your email presence is something you can stand behind.

title: SEO (Search Engine Optimization)
desc: A great website means nothing if the right people can't find it. I take a straightforward, results-focused approach to SEO — reviewing what's working, identifying what isn't, and making meaningful improvements that help your business show up when and where it matters most.

title: Hosting & Infrastructure
desc: The behind-the-scenes work is just as important as what your visitors see. I set up and configure fast, dependable hosting environments tailored to your site — so it stays online, loads quickly, and is built on a foundation that won't let you down as your business grows.

title: More
desc: Every business is different, and not every need fits neatly into a category. If you have something in mind that isn't listed here, reach out anyway — I'm always open to a new challenge and happy to talk through how I can help.
